name: NORTHERN TRUST CORP
business: Northern Trust Corporation is a leading provider of wealth management, asset servicing, asset management and banking solutions to corporations, institutions, families and individuals. The company operates through two client-focused reporting segments: Asset Servicing, which serves institutional investors globally, and Wealth Management, which focuses on high-net-worth individuals and families.

exposures.sentence: Northern Trust uses a variety of machine learning and artificial intelligence (AI) solutions to process transactional activity more efficiently and to mitigate risk.

catalysts.event: Launch of EU Binding Corporate Rules
catalysts.sentence: Northern Trust expects to launch the EU Binding Corporate Rules in 2026.
